今日が初出勤、初接客だものね～。: Today is your first day at work, after all, serving your first customer.
上手くイカせられなかったら、どうしよう……: What if I can't make him finish properly...
お客様の要望に応えてあげるだけで大丈夫よ。<br>あ、でも、無茶な要求や乱暴され:
Just responding to the customer's requests is enough. Ah, but if they
make unreasonable demands or assault you, you must refuse, okay?
あぁ～、そこは任せて！<br>乱暴されそうになったらブン殴っちゃうから！:
Ah, leave that to me! If they try to assault me, I'll beat the crap outta
them!
言っとくけど、イオラさんがお客様に乱暴するのもダメよ？<br>そこは気持ちを押さ:
I'm telling you, Iola, you hitting a customer is no good either. You
need to control yourself and settle things peacefully. Alright?
ふふ、約束よ。<br>あ、予約のお客様が来たわ。よろしく頼むわね。:
Fufu, it's a promise. Ah, the customer who booked is here. I'm
counting on you.
――イオラは客に挨拶をして、手を繋ぎながら２階へ移動する。:
Iola greeted the customer, then led him upstairs while holding his
hand.
